# Mr Mallorca Golf

> Private golf days in Mallorca with PGA Advanced Professional Andy Griffiths. Premium golf experiences, honest course insight, and concierge-style planning for visiting golfers.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.mrmallorcagolf.com/): Main overview of the brand, offer, and enquiry path.
- [Play with a Pro](https://www.mrmallorcagolf.com/play-with-a-pro): Private golf day experiences in Mallorca.
- [Golf Courses](https://www.mrmallorcagolf.com/golf-courses): Course guide covering the island's golf courses.
- [Guides](https://www.mrmallorcagolf.com/guides): Destination, planning, and course advice articles.
- [Contact](https://www.mrmallorcagolf.com/contact): Enquiry page for dates, itinerary, and booking discussions.

## Offer

- The Mallorca Round: Private 18-hole day with Andy, built around your handicap, goals, and the right course.
- The Signature Day: Premium full-day experiences on courses such as Son Gual or Alcanada.
- The Full Experience: Bespoke multi-day golf trips with itinerary support on request.

## Credentials

- Andy Griffiths is a UK PGA Advanced Professional.
- Trackman Master certified.
- TPI Junior Level 3 Coach.
- Based in Mallorca and focused on real-course performance, not range-only instruction.
- Previous experience includes Pebble Beach, Evian, and 11 years coaching in China.

## Audience

- Visiting golfers aged 30-60 with established handicaps and premium expectations.
- Secondary audience: resident and expat golfers in Mallorca seeking expert local guidance.
